experience.title: STAFF ASSISTANT
experience.description: Providing support to Richard Biever, CISO and his staff. Primary duties include calendaring and scheduling responsibilities, telephone screening/triage, preparing materials and making arrangements for conferences and travel.

experience.title: RECEPTIONIST
experience.description: Answering and directing incoming calls, disbursing parking passes and visitor's badges, greeting visitors, accepting and disbursing incoming packages, leave tracking, maintaining telephone directory, and providing support to Staff Assistants.

experience.title: DEPUTY CLERK
experience.description: Ordered and distributed office supplies while adhering to a fixed office budget. Managed office supplies, vendors, organization and upkeep. Directed guests and routed deliveries and courier services.

experience.title: Legal Secretary
experience.description: Preparation of court motions and orders, customer service, billing /accounting and extensive communications with the courts and other law offices.

experience.title: Deputy Clerk
experience.description: Responsible for the filing, preparation and maintenance of court files. Completing and filing Warrant in Debts, completing and filing Garnishments, collecting court fines and costs, data Entry and court room support to the Judge.
